name: gh
description: Install GitHub CLI (gh) silently and add to system PATH. Runs after git so 'gh auth setup-git' and gh-based clone helpers have git available.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\gh-verify.log'; $candidates = @((Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe'), (Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'GitHub CLI\gh.exe'), 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe', 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe', 'C:\Program Files (x86)\GitHub CLI\bin\gh.exe'); $gh = $null; foreach ($p in $candidates) { if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $p) { $gh = $p; break } }; if ($gh) { & $gh --version | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\gh-smoke.txt') -Value 'gh_ok' } else { 'gh.exe not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
